surfaces.dashboard_card: bg-white border border-[#E2DDD7] rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
surfaces.sync_card: bg-white border border-[#E2DDD7] rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden
surfaces.nfc_zone: bg-[#F3EFE9] border border-[#E2DDD7] rounded-3xl shadow-[inset_0_2px_4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)] flex items-center justify-center p-8

nfc_simulation.description: Tactile interactive area for NFC tap.
nfc_simulation.visuals: Uses neumorphic inset shadow. On hover, a subtle pulse. On click (tap), a Terracotta (#B55B49) ripple expands from the center.

sync_indicator.description: Shows Local SSD vs Cloud status.
sync_indicator.visuals: A pill-shaped badge or card header with a breathing dot. If syncing, a 'tracing beam' gradient animates around the card border.

ai_assistant.visuals: Glassmorphic slide-over panel. Uses mono font for medical terms/drugs. Terracotta accent for drug interaction warnings.

queue_display.visuals: Massive typography (text-6xl+). Monospaced numbers for tabular lining. Deep Forest Green.

icons_library.style: duotone for active tabs/actions, regular for standard.

image_urls.description: Subtle modern clinic environment for auth/landing backdrop.
Abstract data/server representation for Cloud vs SSD visual.

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Organic & Earthy palette. Avoid all standard blue/white medical templates to ensure a premium, distinctive presentation.
Use Framer Motion for the NFC tap ripple effect and the Sync status tracing beam.
Implement Shadcn UI components but override their default borders and radii with the variables defined here.
Ensure the Dashboard uses the 'Control Room' dense Bento grid style. Cards should not have high-contrast shadows, rely on 1px borders.
Incorporate the AI chat as a Glassmorphic sliding panel, NOT a generic chat widget.
Apply optical alignment in cards and prioritize generative generous padding (p-6 or p-8) to avoid text collision with borders.
